title: OMGptimized
description: Nickly Optimized, but with optimization mods only, now for 1.21.10!
body:
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15652362bb920cf6d6bbd5ba816f5c8c0d7ee2f4.png)](https://discord.gg/DxsxVhyahd)

![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4a78435f1d3235c6f0c81bb2f1c08416e79c6a.png)
# 📙 Main information
OMGptimized is a modpack for optimization without any additional QoL features. This modpack was created as a result of many hours of research.
# ❓ What about FPS?
On the Ryzen 5 5600x, GTX 1050 and 4 GB of RAM for Minecraft, this modpack outputs more than 2000 FPS.
# 🤔 Why OMGptimized?
Your choice is yours, and I don't want to force you to use my modpack, but I'll appreciate your support and downloads. This modpack has the best optimization pack, which gives the best results on every server/singleworld.
